title: Glacier Gear
description: The Glacier Gear mod for Minecraft adds ice-themed armor, tools, and materials, giving players a new way to gear up using ice.
body:
# ❄️ GlacierGear ❄️

![GigaStudios Image](https://i.postimg.cc/sgDZff0R/Giga-Studios.png)

- Cool down your Minecraft world with the **GlacierGear Mod** — a simple survival-friendly mod that adds new icy tools, armor, and materials!

## 🧊 What’s Inside?

### Step into the cold with:
- **Glacier Armor:** A full set of gear made from ice cubes for that frozen warrior look.
- **Glacier Tools:** Craft pickaxes, swords, and more using icy materials.
- **Ice Extractor:** A new tool used to get Ice Shards from ice blocks.
- **Ice Shards & Ice Cubes:** New materials used in crafting glacier gear.

---

# 🧱 Coming Soon!

🚧 GlacierGear is just getting started! **Packed Ice Armor** is planned for a future update, along with more frozen content to explore.

### Stay tuned for colder upgrades! 🧊❄️

---

## 🛠️ Why Choose GlacierGear?

Whether you're exploring snowy biomes or building an icy base, the **GlacierGear Mod** gives you more reasons to survive in the cold:

- **New Progression:** Mine ice, extract shards, craft cubes, then build gear.
- **Fits Right In:** Simple mechanics that don’t overcomplicate gameplay.
- **Made for Survival:** Everything works in your regular world — no extra steps.

![GigaStudios Image](https://i.postimg.cc/sgDZff0R/Giga-Studios.png)

![Separator](https://i.postimg.cc/tCr453DL/Giga-Studio-Seperator.png)
